entry.title: Re: Cloud Connector を使ってBTPとイントラネット内のAPI Gateway間でmTLS接続はできますか？
entry.content:
返信ありがとうございます。

ApprouterとDestinationを使う場合であれば、Destinationでの認証方式はClientCertificateAuthenticationを使う予定です。

entry.title: Re: Cloud Connector を使ってBTPとイントラネット内のAPI Gateway間でmTLS接続はできますか？
entry.content: PrincipalPropagation でやると API Gateway 側で対応できるのかも調べてみてはどうでしょうか？

entry.title: Re: Supplier Quotation for Partail items in RFQ
entry.content:
Hi Haily:

If you want only maintain some of item's price for a supplier quotation, then you need only save it but not submit RFQ. and then you can continue to maintain the remaining item's price when you get response from supplier. Wait until  all items finally maintained then submit the quotation.

Best Regards

Kane

entry.title: Re: Is Job Information History permission necessary for s...
entry.content:
Hi @Nagavalli_BN ,

In Story reporting type Job information actions/Personal information actions (View Current and View History permission) both are mandatory.

For Employee Central data, users must have permission for the portlets as well (e.g. employmentInfo fields requires permission for 'Job Information Actions' (View Current and View History) or 'Employment Details MSS' and for personalInfo / personInfo it is also required the 'Personal Information Actions' (View Current and View History)).

3213963 - How to find what permissions are missing for the users in the Story report - People Analytics - SAP for Me

Regards,

Subbu

entry.title: Re: how do you schedule story reports to users ?
entry.content:
Hi @Archie102 ,

Story reports can only be scheduled from Report center

Regards,

Subbu

I appreciate your help. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: BW Series – Getting Started (Part 1)
entry.content: @MFR1 as of now there's no ABAP routine in Datasphere bruh. You need to use SQL, SQLScript or Python to transform your data.

entry.title: Re: Get Response from Asynchronous Outbound WebServiceggest
entry.content: This is nothing about Fiori, but the JS to call WS...so you can reffering the code in https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/ways-to-make-an-api-call-in-javascript/

entry.title: Re: Doubt for optimize abap code
entry.content: DATA: lt_sobid TYPE TABLE OF hrp1001-sobid, lt_posids TYPE TABLE OF hrp1001-objid. " Collect all position IDs first LOOP AT is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment INTO DATA(ls_org_assignment). APPEND ls_org_assignment-position_id TO lt_posids. ENDLOOP. " Ensure the table is not empty to prevent runtime errors IF lt_posids IS NOT INITIAL. " Fetch all relevant sobids in a single SELECT statement SELECT sobid FROM hrp1001 CLIENT SPECIFIED INTO TABLE lt_sobid FOR ALL ENTRIES IN lt_posids WHERE mandt = @SY-mandt AND plvar = '01' AND objid = @LT_posids AND begda <= lv_fecha_final AND endda >= lv_fecha_final AND subty = 'A012'. ENDIF. " Processing the results as needed LOOP AT lt_sobid INTO DATA(ls_sobid). " Your logic here using ls_sobid ENDLOOP. Key changes: Use of FOR ALL ENTRIES: This minimizes the number of database calls by collecting all position IDs first. Batch processing: Fetch results using a single database operation. Defensive programming: Check if the table carrying data to fetch (lt_posids) is not initial. Make sure to adjust the final logic loop as per your requirement with the lt_sobid results. This approach reduces database load significantly and should improve performance.

entry.title: Re: Can not select input parameter for Action in Business...

The issue resolved.

I was adding the text field and making the input validation on right side as number which is incorrect.

There is one more control as number # when I used this, my input is enabled for selection.

entry.title: Re: Get Response from Asynchronous Outbound WebServiceggest

entry.title: Re: Get Response from Asynchronous Outbound WebServiceggest
entry.content: I do not find a way to get the response from my Outbound WS in UI5. Please suggest.

entry.title: Short Closed Sub-con POs are still driving demand for child parts
entry.content:
I am from the Planning team in our organization.

We have some suppliers with whom we work in a sub-contracting mode. We generate Sub-con PO and those POs drive the demand for the child parts which we need to consign to our sub-contractor. We have raised a bunch of PO in the past. Some of the POs were short closed by ticking the delivery completed indicator in the PO. I don't see the short-closed POs in MD04, but for the child parts demand still flows from that PO in MD04.

Example. We have Part X which we buy in sub-con mode. It uses Part 1,2,3 which we consign to the sub-contractor. We have placed a sub-con PO for 302 pcs of X and received 297pcs against that PO. 5 pcs are pending quantity. We have now short closed the PO by checking the Delivery Completed Indicator. When i check MD04 for Part X, the short closed PO doesn't show up. But when i search for Part 1, then it shows a DepReq from that PO which we short closed. Ideally i dont want the demand for Part 1 since the PO is already closed. Do you know how to fix this issue?

entry.title: Re: Living SAP Joint Venture Accounting (JVA) - Part 2
entry.content:
Thank you, Ayman. Excellent summary! Additionally, the recovery indicator plays a crucial role in identifying billable and recoverable line items. For billable items, as you mentioned, it aligns with the JOA agreements between partners.

 

On the other hand, recoverability within concessions is determined by cost-sharing mechanisms rather than royalty systems. Here, the recovery indicator is essential in distinguishing between recoverable and non-recoverable OPEX and CAPEX. This functionality enables the operator to prepare and submit the cost recovery statement efficiently through the GJLI report.

entry.title: Actual costing for Professional Services Projects
entry.content:
As per SAP best practice, standard cost rates will be defined and payroll cost will be flowing from employee cost center to WBS via time-sheet booking or other activity confirmations. With this methodology, residual cost (under/over absorption) will be left over in the cost center, as the rates are estimated. 


As most of the employees are tagged to the customer (Professional services) projects with a ratio of 1:1, Business wanted to post the actual payroll cost to the relevant WBS. They don't want to have the under/over absorption in the cost centers. Hence, please let us know the following options.

  1. Similar to the Manufacturing industries' solution, do we have any apps to calculate the actual activity rate and perform the revaluation of customer projects in Professional services industry?
  2. If the above functionality is not available, is it possible to post the payroll directly to the WBS from any external sources?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Actual costing for Professional Services Projects
entry.content:
1. There is no revaluation function for customer project.
  2. Suggest you use app Reassign Costs and Revenues to re-allocate the costs to specific projects.

entry.title: Re: Error 403 when Create Sales Order using API_SALES_ORD...
entry.content:
@MAVRI am facing this problem in SAP Build Apps. I made an web application that creates Sales Order in S/4HANA Public Cloud System. Destination for S/4HANA Public Cloud System is successfully set, and by testing it in SAP Build Apps - Integration - SAP Systems, creation was successful. However, after deploying this application in my CF(web app is running by Work Zone app router), this apps does not work and there's error message tells me

"POST request to /my application destination/ completed with status 403 The request contains an invalid x-csrf-token."

How can I fix this issue?

entry.title: Re: Get Response from Asynchronous Outbound WebServiceggest
entry.content: IB WS is FAA_FIXED_ASSET_CREATE_MAIN_WEBI and OB WS is CO_FAA_MD_ESR_CREATE_MAIN_CONF_SPRX

entry.title: Re: Let's Create a JSON Path Query Tool In SAP UI5 As Simple as Possible
entry.content:
Hi Community,

" 

  • Data may be interactively found and extracted out of JSON structures on the client without special scripting.
  • JSON data requested by the client can be reduced to the relevant parts on the server, such minimizing the bandwidth usage of the server response.  "

 

Thanks for your kindly sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

Regards,

🙂

ZFioir.

entry.title: Is it possible to enable delta printing for production order printiing?
entry.content:
Hi PP Guru,

In terms of reprinting, can we only print delta change?

It is available for PM order.

However it seems not available for PP order in OPK8.

Would you please extend your support on this?

Appreciate your help.

Sally

entry.title: coois purchase order details wrong
entry.content:
尊敬的先生

清單：PPIOT000 採購訂單

哈德的絕對日期

基本開始日期2024/12/01~2024/12/31

查看採購訂單明細，第1項顯示工單100030491，工單工序30

但如果coois過濾條件是工單100030313 100030491，過濾條件沒有日期，但它帶出工單100030491、採購訂單2500011440和項目1，這是正確的。

entry.title: Call transaction CJI3 with layout
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I'm calling CJI3 by using parameter ID's and "call transaction" statement (including 2 parameters that aren't shown in the F1 technical screen - KS7 & KS8 for posting dates).

Now I'm also required to add another selection field - Layout.

I don't know if it has a corresponding parameter ID (F1 doesn't show anything nor its corresponding data element - SLIS_VARI.

If anyone knows what's its parameter ID it would be great.

An alternative should be submitting the program but it doesn't work. Nothing happens in the report and no results are shown. I'm using the following command: "SUBMIT rkpep003 WITH P_DISVAR = p_disvar AND RETURN."
Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.title: Re: How to write "IF THEN ELSE" statement with BEX query Key Figure technical ID object in

Do I need to use the datasource name before the field name Net Invoice Value to complete the formula or Is there anything I need to put after the field name such as Net Invoice Value.something ?

entry.title: Re: Supplier Quotation for Partail items in RFQ
entry.content:
Hi Kane,

Thank you for your response.

The issue I’m facing is that I don’t always receive pricing for all items from a vendor.

For example, when we create an RFQ with three items and send it to multiple vendors, some vendors only provide quotations for two of the listed items and leave the remaining one without a price. How can I handle creating quotations for partial items in such cases?

entry.title: ABAP CDS for datasource 0FI_AR_4
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking for ABAP CDS views for standard datasource 0FI_AR_4 which is equivalent to AP/AR BW classic datasources.

I got below links but not working now. 

https://help.sap.com/doc/474a13c5e9964c849c3a14d6c04339b5/100/en-US/75cb7fd2687a4a6987f88e9806d19499.html

Amit

entry.title: ABWKONTI - Absence Quota output table data is incorrect
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I'm able to generate Absence Quota using PT60. However, the output table ABWKONTI balance showing incorrect only for 2026 and the issue is not persistent for any other years (Example: Qta Type 31- 5 days for all the years, but for 2026 it's showing 10 days. 

Also, I have checked the PCR calculation and it's calculating 5 days only. Kindly review the attached screenshots and assist me.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Update manually added Standard Fields to St...
entry.content:
hi @Sanket001 

I already find out how to extend API standard using the Guides that SAP given in link below.
Custom Fields | SAP Help Portal

Hence, I make my own documentation to make it easier. Just follow the steps in my documentation below, hopefully it's able to solve your problems.

1.    Create Custom Fields – FIORI APP: Custom Fields and Logic

First, we need to know which Business Contexts that can be extended by custom fields. In my case, I’d like to add field Material Account Assignment Group (VBAP- KTGRM) in API Customer Return (API_CUSTOMER_RETURN_SRV). Since this is standard field, what we can do is we create a custom field (ZZ1_MaterialAccountAsg) and later we will map the value into standard field (VBAP-KTGRM)

Business Context can be found in api.sap.com website corresponding to the API and check “Extensibility” tab:

 

More details on how to create custom fields you can find in link: Custom Fields | SAP Help Portal

In my case, since the field KTGRM in Item level, I should use business context: SD_SALESDOCITEM.
Next step is, we go to the FIORI App – Custom Fields, can go to FIORI Launch pad via SAP GUI using T-Code: /UI2/FLP

To create custom fields, can follow the step below:

  1. Click ‘+’ on the screen, and fill in the required fields. Once done, then click create.

 

 

  1. Enable this field for the specific API.
    Click the custom fields, and check the API Tab, then enable the fields by click button ‘Enable Usage’.
    In my case, I’ll enable the fields for API_CUSTOMER_RETURN_SRV

 

  1. Publish the fields.
    Once done, can proceed to Publish. Finally, your field now is available for particular API

     

2.    Implement BADI Cloud – FIORI APP: Custom Logic

 

More details on this can be found here: Creating Implementations | SAP Help Portal

Open FIORI APP: Custom Logic app and click Create

Filter the Extension Point by filling the Business Context.

 


So from here, there is 16 Extension Points (BADI) which is relevant to Sales Document Item.
In my case, I choose the BAdI SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM  because it’s relevant with our created Custom Field.

 

 

We can check the BAdI is valid or not in SE18 via SAP GUI, to see the Importing and Exporting Parameters:

Once we go through the interface of the BAdI, we can see the Exporting / Changing fields now it has a custom field that we created:

 

Proceed to Publish the BAdI

Open Code Editor and add your logic
Click the BAdI, and click button ‘Open Code Editor’ as below:

In my case, I just map from the input payload, into the output custom field (will be stored in VBAP- ZZ1_MATERIALACCOUNTASG_SDI):

Once done, can publish the code.
Notes: this BAdI can only edited by this Fiori app, cannot via SE18 SAP GUI.

3.    Find User Exit and Enhance – SAP GUI

Next step is, find the user exit. Try to put debugger in the implemented BaDI, trigger it by requesting POST via Postman.
Then when the debugger is on, I can see that this BAdI is put inside transactional level (can check the previous ABAP stack):

 

As per image above, Cloud BAdI is called in line 968, then subsequently go to user exit in line 971.
From there, I can enhance the exit, and map the custom field value into standard field.
VBAP-KTGRM = VBAP-ZZ1_MATERIALACCOUNTASG_SDI.

4.    Transport Custom Objects

There are 2 steps to assign to transport request.

  1. FIORI APP: Configure Software Packages

Can follow guides here How to Configure Software Packages | SAP Help Portal
Package that we are using is ZFIORI

  1. FIORI APP: Register Extensions for Transport

Can follow guides here How to Register Extensions for Transport | SAP Help Portal

  1. Reassign your custom objects into Package ZFIORI

  1. Assign to Transport Request
    Choose ‘For Full Retransport’

entry.title: Re: How to maintain the Long Text Template Language for M...
entry.content:
Hello,

As far as I know, the template language in S/4HANA Public Cloud is fixed as EN, I have tried in my internal test system and the long text always in English no matter which user language I select.

Since you mentioned you were able to see the language changed as logon language in one of your system and not working in another. I would suggest you to raise a SAP support ticket to analyze accordingly.

Best Regards,

Nick

entry.title: Re: Template in Application Jobs order status change to B...
entry.content: Hi Aoime02, As Tim mentioned, the application job template for CO99 is not available in S/4HANA Public Cloud. Please raise a customer influence if you would like the possibility added by following the KBA 2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product. Best Regards, Nick

entry.title: Re: Equipment warranty check based on conditions
entry.content:
Hello Prateek

Below link lists all available BADI in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, it does not include BADI mentioned in note 2698731 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/2dfa044a255f49e89a3050daf3c61c11/8c974e59e023450e82a899e89db853d0.html

There is also no available SSCUI can meet your requirement.

The request you describe is very meaningful and valuable feedback. Future enhancement topics  are mainly driven by the Customer Influence programs.

Please submit a feature request if you would like the possibility added by following the KBA  2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product 

regards

Icey

entry.title: Re: Warranty alert / pop-up on equipment
entry.content: Hello Prateek Below link lists all available BADI in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, it does not include BADI mentioned in note 2698731 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/2dfa044a255f49e89a3050daf3c61c11/8c974e59e023450e82a899e89db853d0.html?locale=en-US There is also no available SSCUI can meet your requirement. The request you describe is very meaningful and valuable feedback. Future enhancement topics are mainly driven by the Customer Influence programs. Please submit a feature request if you would like the possibility added by following the KBA 2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product regards Icey

entry.title: Re: When uploading bank statements, error: Currency USD n...
entry.content: Thank you for your explanation. I’m trying to fully understand the relationship between primary and alternative account numbers in this scenario. Could you elaborate on how the system's fuzzy search works when validating bank account master data during a bank statement upload? Specifically, I’d like to understand: How the system prioritizes account matches when there’s a conflict between a primary and an alternative account number. What best practices can be followed to avoid such issues during configuration. If this error can be prevented entirely through additional validation settings or tools within the SAP system.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Service Layer - Internal Error (-5002) When Us...
entry.content:
Hi,

The issue could be related to corruption in User tables. Please create a support ticket to get the data checked/corrected.

One of the known issue is with the user permission and menus. You can run below query in the database to check whether the corruption exists.

Select * from USR3 where "USR3"."PermId" not in (select "OUPT"."AbsId" from OUPT) and "USR3"."PermId" not in (select TO_NVARCHAR("CDPM"."PermId") from CDPM)

regards

balaji

entry.title: Update the amount for a condition type at delivery level
entry.content: I want to update the amount for a particular condition type when we go to the condition tab for a delivery number. Is there any BAPI or enhancement for it?

entry.title: Re: How to get the key fields of a CDS view?
entry.content:
Hi There,
Is there any way to get the whole list of CDS fields in the correct sequence consumed in the CDS View + the one showing the mapping to its initial DDIC layer fields?

entry.title: Multiple characteristics values for different lengths of LAM data?
entry.content:
PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) 

Hi,

I have created FLOC, attached linear characteristics to it as LAM, and configured everything including the organizational area. Characteristics are visible in LAM tab as they are assigned to one class and this class has the same organizational area. While assigning characteristics to class I have maintained the same organizational area.
Aslo while creating characteristics I have maintained multiple values.
Problems:
1—If I have assigned characteristics values on the classification tab of floc, then only I can see the characteristics in the below screen of the LAM tab. It copies the same value for a particular segment length.
2- I want the same characteristics but different values for different lengths. For example, commissioning of the transmission line was laid by multiple contractors, I will create one characteristic saying "CONTRACTOR" and I will name all contractors for different lengths in linear data characteristics value

Regards,

Kaushal Rai


I cant remove this name Vijay with another name.
Regards,
RaiSaab

entry.title: Re: In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, how are locations activa...
entry.content:
Hello

According to question description, I assumed you need to create functionali location and maontenance notification or maintenance order. Please refer to below links

Functional Location

Maintenance Notifications and Orders

If it is incorrect understanding, please provide more detailed explanation.

Regards

Icey

entry.title: Re: RFC failure from Commerce Cloud to On-Premise ECC
entry.content:
I also followed the same steps but getting below error.

Unable to create entity for HostAliasSetRequestApiDTO due to: Host Alias set 'DEV_ERP_HOST_ALIAS.txt' is not valid. Reason: Rule '<NAT IP> <Host Name>' is not a valid hosts file entry!

Resolved : Issue is Uppercase letter was present in host name. Chnaged all Uppercase to lowercase and it works.

SAP Commerce Cloud 2211.25

entry.title: CO08 - When I try to create a PO reference with SO using Tcode - CO08. CO object error
entry.content:
Problem Statement:

I am trying to create a production order with reference to a sales order using Tcode CO08. However, when executing the transaction, I encounter the following error:
"Sales order has no CO object."

I have attached a screenshot of the error message for reference.

Can anyone suggest how I can resolve this error and successfully create a production order?

entry.title: Re: LFA1 - WERKS Filed addition in MDG UI Screen
entry.content:
Hi Guru,

The field is just not enabled on the UI, however it is supported. 

I am not sure which version of MDG you are on, however there is a note which talks about a program error at Genil level which causes auto-refresh during roundtrip.

2908683 - MDG-S: Plant vendor field value is cleared on UI refresh

Please have a look and see if it fixes your issue.

Regards
Anirban

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Order Form Print - PDF
entry.content: Hi @former_member204244 I have the same can you explain to me what I can change?

entry.title: Upgraded 2211.FP1 to 2211.31, swagger url is redirecting to hac
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 
 I have upgraded from 2211.FP1 to 2211.31 in my local. Upgrade is successful, I am able to start my server. No issues I have found while build is happening.
But swagger url is redirecting to hac login page.
Any suggestions?
#swagger #hac #2211.31

entry.title: Build Apps POST call - HTTP 403 Error (Invalid CSRF Token)
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

I need your help on something about x-csrf-token problem.

I am making an web application that creates Sales Order to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition by Build Apps.

Connection to S/4HANA is made by destination, and web application is deployed to my BTP subaccount's HTML5 Repository.

Screenshot under is the destination I set to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition's "Sales Order(A2X)" OData V2 api.

Type : HTTP

URL : https://{tenant}-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap

Proxy Type : Internet

Authentication : Basic

 

<Additional Properties>

AppgyverEnabled : true

BuildApps.RequiresCsrf : true

HTML5.DynamicDestination : true

sap.applicationdevelopment.actions.enabled : true

sap.build.usage : odata_gen

sap.processautomation.enabled : true

WebIDEEnabled : true

 

Plus, I 

As you can see, I added "BuildApps.RequiresCSRF = true" to my destination so I can see the CSRF token settings too.

However, as I deploy this application and try to create Sales Order, error occurs and I can see this error message in my HTML5 repository.

What should I do to fix this problem??

entry.title: My Inbox Fiori App Performance Issue Due Reading unnecessary Work Items in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have implemented the My Inbox Fiori application in our S/4HANA system, where multiple workflow tasks  are configured for decisions like leave requests and service entries. However, we are facing a performance issue: the My Inbox app takes an unusually long time to load, even for just four line items.

Our technical consultant investigated the issue and found that the app is reading a significant amount of data from CATSDB work items in the backend. These CATSDB entries contain numerous line items, which seems to be causing the delay.

Since CATSDB-relevant data is not required in our My Inbox application, we are looking for a solution to exclude or filter out this data to improve the app's performance.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue? How can we prevent My Inbox from reading unnecessary CATSDB work items or optimize the data retrieval process? Any advice, configuration tips, or notes would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to use a ZIP file containing multiple WSDL files in SAP Integration Suite iFlow?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working with SAP Integration Suite and trying to integrate an external SOAP service. I have received a ZIP file containing multiple WSDL files, where each WSDL references others. However, I am unsure about the process for using these WSDL files in an iFlow in SAP Integration Suite.

I understand that SAP Integration Suite typically expects a single WSDL file for service consumption, but my case involves multiple WSDLs referencing each other.

Could someone guide me on how to:

  1. Properly import and use multiple WSDL files in the SAP Integration Suite.
  2. Resolve any references between the WSDLs so that they work seamlessly in the iFlow.
  3. Any specific steps or considerations when working with a ZIP file of WSDLs in this context.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Regards

entry.title: Introduction of Early Login in SAP Commerce Cloud B2B Application
entry.content:
Overview

In B2B settings, Early Login is a widely adopted feature that requires users to log in before gaining access to the website. This article will explore two popular methods to activate Early Login. Additionally, we will discuss how to bypass this feature, allowing users to access specific pages without logging in. We will also cover how to enable user registration while Early Login is active.

Two Ways to Enable Early Login

Enable Early Login in Composable Storefront

You can directly enable Early Login in Composable Storefront by providing the following configuration in spartacus-configuration.module.ts:

 

 

ConfigModule.withConfig({
    routing: {
        protected: true,
    }
})

 

 

This configuration mandates that users must be logged in to access any route controlled by the CMS.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Please note, The only exceptions to this rule are certain routes labeled as public in the default-routing-config.ts file, including:

  • login
  • register
  • forgot password
  • reset password
As you access these routes, you needn't first login.

Enable Early Login in Sap Commerce Cloud

You can also enable Early Login by setting "Requires Authentication" option to true for specific B2B website (such as Spartacus powertools Site) in Backoffice:

entry.title: PowerDesigner cannot connect to repository after client update
entry.content:
Hello,

We updated the PowerDesiger client in our Citrix environment from version 16.7 SP07 PL02 to 16.7 SP08 PL01.

With the new client version we get the following error when trying to connect.
"The Repository cannot be upgraded using a proxy connection. Use a direct connection." 
and
"The connection failed because the repository has not been installed on this database" 

Thank you

 

What are we missing? why cant we connect?
I alreay tried the following notes.

 

DIGITS - Cannot connect to the PowerDesigner Repository using a proxy connection after upgrading - SAP PD
DIGITS - Proxy connection: Prompted to upgrade the repository - SAP PD 

DIGITS - Cannot connect to ASE repository (connection failed) – SAP PD 
This is not valif for us.

Thanks in advance.

Rohit


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: PowerDesigner cannot connect to repository after clie...
entry.content:
Hello,

To upgrade the PD client to a newer SP, it is necessary to upgrade the repository definitions as well.
To accomplish this, connect to the repository using a Direct repository definition and execute the SQL script when prompted.
After that, and users will be able to connect via the Proxy.

You can find further details about how to perform a safe upgrade in KBA 3246527 - What are the instructions to upgrade?

Kind regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Issue with Modifying Remediation Plan DueDate in GRC-PC
entry.content:
Hi Carlos,

Did you try the Roles and Replacement feature in GRC PC for changing the processor?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Use variables in apps search form
entry.content:
Hi AndersPersson,

I think it's not possible to fill variable in the search filter directly.

As workaround, maybe you can try to create custom CDS view during which you can define filter with Session variable, i.e. $session.user. 

See screenshot for your reference.

Best Regards,

Nick

entry.title: Re: ABWKONTI - Absence Quota output table data is incorrect
entry.content: Hi Ajay,

entry.title: Re: Sold-to Party for Equipment - CDS View
entry.content:
Hi Rob,

If you search for partner and filter with application component PM*, you should see that CDS views related to partner function and technical object are not released.

As workaround, I would suggest you to try with API_EQUIPMENT and entity EquipmentPartner. Below Help documentation for your reference. 

Equipment Partner Functions

 

Best Regards,

Nick

entry.title: Re: ABWKONTI - Absence Quota output table data is incorrect
entry.content: Hi Ajay, I have attached the suggested screenshots. Also, there is no multiplication factor or UPDTQ in use.

entry.title: Mass upload of Customizing in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hii Everyone,

I have to do a customizing activity of maintaining Hu types for each storage bin type in SPRO>SCM>EWM>GOOD RECEIPT PROCESS>STRATEGIES>STORAGE BIN DETERMINATION>HU TYPES>DEFINE HU TYPES FOR EACH STORAGE BIN TYPES.

I have around 7000 entries that need to be maintained which is a lot to do manually. I was wondering if there was a way around it to do it by mass upload.

Any help and info is appreciated.

 

Best regards,

Rashmi Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Doubt for optimize abap code
entry.content: Please use the buttons "..." and "</>" to display your code nicely, to make it legible. See how to do it here: https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/how-to-post-code-in-sap-community-gt-2024/qaq-p/13684774

entry.title: Issue with Aligning Elements of Data Table in Center ?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently facing an issue with aligning the elements of a data table to the center in my MDK app in android platform. Despite trying various CSS properties and alignment techniques, the elements remain misaligned.  I have also set the TextAlignment property to center, but it does not align the data in the center. 

I would appreciate any guidance or suggestions on how to resolve this issue. Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: TechEdの10年
entry.content:
はじめに

2024年10月、今年もTechEdが開催され参加しました。
初めて参加した2014年のTechEdから10年強が経ちますが、ふと「当時のTechEdはどうだったか？現在のTechEdではそれらがどうなっているか？」ということが気になり始めたので、昔と今を緩く並べながら、自由気ままに、年の瀬らしく、振り返ってみることにしました。その内容をブログに書き起こすという何の芸も飾りもありませんが、最後まで御目通し頂けますと幸いです。

（この記事は SAP Advent Calendar 2024 の12月11日分の記事として執筆しています。）

 

TechEdの名称

2014年2024年

SAP TechEd && d-code

SAP TechEd Virtual

（＋ SAP TechEd On Tour）

2014年のTechEdは、その名称に尾ひれが付いていました。実はこの年、TechEdの名称を今後はd-codeに変えるというアナウンスがありました。より開発者に焦点を当てていくという趣旨だったと思います。その後いろいろな議論があったのだと推察しますが、翌年から結局は元のTechEdで開催されて今も続いています。名称が ”SAP TechEd” でなかったのはこの年の特徴だったように思います。

一方の2024年のTechEdも特徴的で、Virtual（オンライン）とOn Tour（オンサイト＠各Region）の2種類の形式での開催となり、開催時期も別々に分けられたため両方にリアルタイムで参加ができるスタイルとなりました。On Tourには参加できませんでしたが、コミュニティの皆様のF/Bを拝見/拝聴しますと、各Regionならではの良さが感じられとても興味深い内容でした。

 

開催日数

2014年2024年

5日間

2日間

2014年は5日間でした。1日目の夜にビジネスKeynoteがあり、2日目の朝にテクノロジーKeynoteがあったので、行動スケジュールも今とは少し違っていました。2020年に初めてオンライン形式での開催となって以降、開催日数は縮小されて元の規模には戻ってきておらず、これは近年のオンサイト形式での開催でも同様です。日数が少ない状況下でオンサイト参加する場合は、現地でしかできない行動も加わり参加セッション数が必然的に少なくなるため、帰国後にオンラインの録画で不足を補完したりもします。これも昔にはない、個人的にカスタマイズした新しい参加スタイルになっています。

 

セッショントラックの種類

2014年2024年

9個

Cloud Integration, Orchestration, and Intelligent Processes [INT]
Data Management and Modeling [DMM]
Development and Extension Platform for SAP HANA and Cloud [DEV]
Enterprise Analytics, Business Intelligence, and Planning [EA]
IT and Cloud Management [ITM]
Mobile Solution Development [MOB]
Secure Development and Configuration [SEC]
Technology, Strategy and Innovations [TEC]
User Experience and User Interface Development [UXP]

6個

Digital Transformation with Cloud ERP [DT]
Application Development and Automation [AD]
Artificial Intelligence [AI]
Data and Analytics [DA]
Integration [IN]
SAP Business Technology Platform [XP]

 

2014年はトラックの種類が多く、個々のトラック名称も長く、覚えるのに苦労しました。後程触れますが、この年は今までのABAPだけでなく、Cloudや技術のOpen化を目指し始めた年でもあったため、トラックの統一感はまだありませんでした。今はBTPやCloud ERPという基軸がありメッセージも分かりやすく収れんされているため、トラック名からおおよそのセッション内容が想像しやすくなりました。当時は興味があるセッションを探すのが大変でした。

 

セッション数

2014年2024年

770+

100+　

2014年の9つのトラックで、最もセッション数が多かったのがデータマネジメント [DMM] でした。そのトラックだけで約200のセッションが用意された背景には、当時のIoTとBig Dataブームがあったと思います。近年のようなオンライン開催になると、毎回セッション数は大幅に削減されています。

 

参加場所

2014年2024年

 

イメージです

これはもういいですかね、2014年当時の自分は、まさか家からTechEdなんて思いもしてなかったはずです。オンライン参加で欠けがちな熱量やモチベーションを高めるため、2024年のKeynoteは、音響のよい特殊な施設（セルフKeynote会場）に皆で集まりました。映画館感覚で大型スクリーンに画面投影してリアルタイム視聴し、その直後に意見交換を行うような工夫も取入れたりしました。

 

キーノートのテーマ

2014年2024年

”Making it real”

”Where ideas get real”

あれ、あまり変わっていない？時が経っても変わらないrealへの挑戦。

 

発表されたテクノロジー

2014年2024年

 

 

2014年は、まだS/4HANAが世に出ておらず、インメモリデータベースとしてのHANAが物事の中心でした。「HANA SPS09を発表します！」と出た瞬間に会場が大フィーバーだったのを覚えています。ちなみに当時のHANAのDBサイズは512GBが主流だったので時代を感じます。一方、Cloudシフトが謳われ始めたのもこの頃からでした。SAP初のPaaSであるHCP（HANA Cloud Platform）が発表され、技術のOpen化がここから始まったように思います。当時は何がなんだかわからなかったのですが、これがのちのSCP、BTPへと脈々と受け継がれていきます。

 

おわりに

TechEdは時代に合わせた変化を遂げながらも、多くの事柄を提供してくれる大切なイベントであることに変わりはないということを、振り返りを通して改めて確認することができました。書き終えた時点で思ったことは、「向こう10年はどうなっていくのかな？」ということでした。その頃のテーマは何なのか、その時にTechEdはまだ存在しているのか。なんらかの形でそこに関わっていたいなと想う、2024年の暮れでした。

「TechEdの10年」。最後までお読み頂き、ありがとうございました。

entry.title: Re: How to activate CDS views that depend on each other?
entry.content: Tried mass activation with the mass activation icon, i still get the errors that I would have got if I had activated them independently

entry.title: Re: Universal ID Problem with Linked Accounts
entry.content:
Hi community, 

 

I was suffering the same issue with linking the two accounts to the Universal ID Manager. I already have one universal ID (using my official email id) before that personal email id to be linked with First Universal ID. after that I created another new universal ID (Personal email id). Now both the Mail ids are linked.

entry.title: ME55 release option rejection SAP
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I want to rejection Purchase Requisition Number with ME55. How can I do this process?

entry.title: Re: Bottleneck work center to multiple operations
entry.content: Hi, The scrap you input is the operation scrap which does not reflect to the scrap in the production order header. The scrap in the production order header is the assembly scrap. The assembly scrap will add your order quantity. For example, you want to produce 100 quantity assembly material, you need to set the order quantity as 102 if there is 2% scrap portion. Means that you will scrap 2 quantity.

entry.title: Multiple counter plan order not being generated
entry.content:
Hello! I am currently working on a multiple counter plan , when i schedule the plan after i pass the first cycle , an order is generated but as shown below when  i pass the second cycle no order is generated 

I used a cycle  : sequence 1 : 10000 km / 30 days   and sequence 2 : 30000 km / 40 days

Can someone explain to me why and what i am doing wrong ?

Thank you!

entry.title: Overcoming Limitations in Public Cloud: Solving SUM of Rows in Custom CDS Views Using Eclipse ADT
entry.content:
In SAP Reports development, one challenge faced by developers working with CDS Views in public cloud is the inability to perform operation like SUM of rows in Custom CDS Views. 

While ‘Custom CDS Views’ application (key-user extensibility) in public cloud aims to simplify many aspects on creating a report, but some complex calculations such as summing values over multiple rows or complex calculated logical operations is not possible using ‘Custom CDS Views; app.

Problem Statement: SUM of Rows in Custom CDS Views 
In On Premise System, developers have more flexibility to create complex calculations, utilizing function like Sum(). But when working with Custom CDS Views in S/4Hana Public Cloud certain operations such as summing values across multiple rows are not supported. 
 
Solution: Using Eclipse ADT to Solve the Requirement 
Let's consider an example where multiple Material Documents (Material Docs) exist for the same material, and we need to sum up the quantities for that material.

Material Doc year 

Material DOC 

Material DOC Item 

Material 

Plant 

Quantity 

EntryUnit 

2024 

50000001 

1 

test 

1001 

10 

EA 

2024 

50000002 

1 

test 

1001 

50 

EA 

2024 

50000003 

1 

test 

1001 

5 

EA 

2024 

50000004 

1 

test 

1001 

100 

EA 

2024 

50000005 

1 

test 

1001 

65 

EA 

2024 

50000006 

1 

test 

1001 

40 

EA 

2024 

50000006 

2 

test 

1001 

25 

EA 

 
The requirement here is to sum the quantities for the same material (test) and plant (1001), regardless of the individual material document entries. 
we can solve the issue on ABAP Development Tools (ADT) in Eclipse.

Steps to Implement the Solution: 
  Create a Data Definition: In Eclipse, first, create a data definition for your custom CDS view and define view. 

Here is the example code:


define view TotalQuantity
as select from I_MaterialDocumentItem_2 as a 
{

 key a.Material,  key a.Plant, 

      a.EntryUnit as Meins, 

      a.QuantityInBaseUnit, 

      @Semantics.quantity.unitOfMeasure: 'Meins' 

      sum(a.QuantityInBaseUnit) as TotalQuantity 

}

group by 

  a.Material, 

  a.Plant, 

  a.EntryUnit 

 

•  I_MaterialDocumentItem_2 is the CDS view that contains all the data related to individual Material Documents and quantity with material. 
•  The sum(a.QuantityInBaseUnit) is the operation,summing the QuantityInBaseUnit across multiple rows based on the material and plant. 
•  group by is used to group the records by Material, Plant, and EntryUnit to perform the sum. 
 
After defining save and activate

 

The Result: 

Material 

Plant 

Total Quantity 

test 

1001 

295 

@Oleg_Vokh @HakanHaslaman @krishnanunni_sudhakaranpi @Andre_Fischer @yevgen_trukhin @julieplummer20 @kaitorsten_schipper 
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: Control Code /SAC/HSN Code Creation
entry.content: Dear Omprakash, you can use the tile " Mass Upload Utility" , Where you can Download the template , Edit or add HSN you wanted with descriptions and then Upload.

entry.title: Is it possible to create a CRUD SAP Fiori Elements app only using S/4 Public API?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am exploring SAP Fiori Elements and its capabilities. I am trying to create a CRUD Fiori Elements app for S/4 HANA Public Cloud Product API. I have set up a destination for the public cloud and used Fiori generator to use a List Report template. This spins out a display only Fiori elements app which is great. However, is it possible to enable Create and Delete actions just using the annotations or in any other way without making use of CAP to extend the Product API?

Many thanks!

SAP Fiori Elements SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment SAP Cloud Application Programming Model

entry.title: Re: Call transaction CJI3 with layout
entry.content: For information, the answer is program-dependent, it means that someone will look at the ABAP code for you, possibly debug for you, and answer. You might want to learn how to do it yourself. What difficulty do you have in reading ABAP code?

entry.title: Need help! How to set ETag for a PATCH request with OData V2 Remote Client Proxy
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Good Day!

Currently I'm developing a feature in SAP BTP ABAP environment, which will communicate with our SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud system through API (remote OData) to update Product Master Data.

Precisely, I'm trying to update Change Master header data through this API. I'm using OData remote client proxy with Service Consumption Model and call to a PATCH request to achieve the desired outcome.

Now the thing is, when I execute the request, it said If-Match is missing. So I try to handle this by first calling a GET request to the same Entity (with same key), then get the ETag from the response header.

After that I add the ETag as the If-Match value and call the PATCH request again. But this time the response is "If-Match is requested but no ETag property was found" and it ends up with error.

I tried multiple ways, like using HTTP client only, or change the format of the ETag value. But none of them really helps.

I'll put the source code I used below for more details.

 

 

    DATA lo_resource      TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_resource_entity.
    DATA lo_request       TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_request_update.
    DATA lo_read_request  TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_request_read.
    DATA ls_patch_req_busi_data TYPE ty_patch_request_data.
    DATA ls_read_data TYPE ty_read_data.

    IF mo_client_proxy IS INITIAL.
*      mo_client_proxy = get_client_proxy( ).
      " Create http client
      DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement(
                                                   comm_scenario  = '<my_communication_scenario>'
                                                   comm_system_id = '<my_communication_system>'
                                                   service_id     = '<my_service_id>' ).
      DATA(lo_http_client) = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( lo_destination ).

      mo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_factory_remote=>create_v2_remote_proxy(
                            is_proxy_model_key       = VALUE #( repository_id       = 'DEFAULT'
                                                                proxy_model_id      = gc_proxy_model_id-cma
                                                                proxy_model_version = '0001' )
                            io_http_client           = lo_http_client
                            iv_relative_service_root = '' ).
    ENDIF.

    " Navigate to the resource and create a request for the update operation
    lo_resource = mo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set(
                    'A_CHANGE_MASTER' )->navigate_with_key( ms_entity_key ).

    " Get Etag
    lo_read_request = lo_resource->create_request_for_read( ).
    DATA(lo_read_response) = lo_read_request->execute( ).
    DATA(lv_etag) = lo_read_response->get_etag( ).

    lo_request = lo_resource->create_request_for_update( /iwbep/if_cp_request_update=>gcs_update_semantic-patch ).

    lo_request->set_if_match(   " <--- Error will be raised at this step
      EXPORTING
        iv_etag = lv_etag    " Not working
*        iv_etag = |W/"{ lv_etag }"|   " Not working
*        iv_etag = |W/'{ lv_etag }'|   " Not working
*        iv_etag = |W/"'{ lv_etag }'"|   " Not working
*        iv_etag = '*'                 " Not working
    ).

    ls_patch_req_busi_data = CORRESPONDING #( ms_business_data ).
    lo_request->set_business_data(
      EXPORTING
        is_business_data            = ls_patch_req_busi_data
        it_provided_property        = me->get_entity_properties( ls_patch_req_busi_data ) ).

    " Execute the request
    lo_request->execute( ).

I really needs help for this point, maybe I messed up something in between? Hopefully someone can show me the way.

Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.title: Re: Generative AI with SAP – Part 3: Joule, SAP’s Generative AI Copilot
entry.content: Very nice insights on Joule.

entry.title: What is the need for scope items 2EL, 2EJ
entry.content:
What does activating the scope items 2EL and 2EJ allow me to do?

I am looking at the SAP business accelerator Hub for the required scope items when using the API. So, for example, if I want to change the registration of an order slip, activating BD9 will allow me to use the standard APIs I need. However, I do not see any mention of 2EL there.

entry.title: Re: How to setup Time Evaluation in Time Tracking
entry.content:
Hi @TB

Thanks for the great article, certainly a must for any Time Management consultant.
I've been struggling with fulfilling client requirements using yearly variables and was hoping you could provide me with some guidance:

  1. Overtime up to 100h per year should be paid according to certain premium (50%) and after 100h per year should be paid at another premium (100%)
  2. Worked holidays up to 9 a year should not have any premium paid but employee should receive one leave day from the 10th worked holiday onwards

For A. I've been able to set up a Time Container for flexible periods however I'm unable to use this value to influence the overtime calculation. While for B. I can't even set up the time container as it does not support Counter.

I would be very grateful for any guidance you may provide!
Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Overcoming Limitations in Public Cloud: Solving SUM o...
entry.content: Thanks, for the solution @sunilpadhy12

entry.title: Re: Overcoming Limitations in Public Cloud: Solving SUM o...

entry.title: Re: Many Transformations missing after System Refresh

entry.title: I want to restrict to a fewer line items for Std odata service SD_PRICING_CONDITIONRECORD
entry.content:
Hi All,

I  want to restrict to a fewer line items for odata service SD_PRICING_CONDITIONRECORD which is used in Fiori App Manage Prices ( Sales  ) . Could you please let me know the best way for this.

1) Copy the standard Odata service into custom and create a new FIORI  app or 

2) Is  there any way that can we control the Output of standard fiori app Fiori App Manage Prices ( Sales  ).

I know we can add additional Fields using Custom Fields and Logic app .  But my question is different I want to add additional logic to the standard odata service so that I can get only records based on some condition.

 

Thanks,

Bala

entry.title: Pricing issue in PO
entry.content:
Hello,

while creating PO, system says net price must be greater than Zero. Some conditions are with zero price and are formula driven and do not accept fixed rate too as below manually. what to do ? Pls suggest.

we are in S/4 HANA

rgds

sachin

entry.title: Re: Asset Accounting - Deprecation Below Zero
entry.content: Thanks OwenLiu, thanks for adding the tag. Do you mean the Labels? I have not added any other tags, as I understand.
test

entry.title: Performance Management data not available on Advanced Reporting
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to create a report on Goal Management in the Advanced Reporting tool but, for some reason, I'm not able to find the Performance Management table. nor any table related with Performance and Goals. This module is configured in the instance and we were able to find the tables on both Stories and Detailed Reporting. 

Does anyone know what could possibly be the problem?

Thank you in advance,
Pedro Ferreira

entry.title: Re: MDG DQM Validation Rules – Access additional data model tables without ABAP coding
entry.content:
Hello Sabine, first of all, thank you for sharing this blog. Your post is very informative and helpful. I’d like to share a point and get your thoughts on it.

In the blog, you noted that Process ID, Step Number, Source System, and Source ID are automatically filled. However, when I tested the same rule, these fields appeared empty for the change request process. Interestingly, when I tested it with the data quality evaluation process, these fields were filled. Do you have any idea what might be causing this discrepancy?

For Data Quality Evaluation


For Change Request

Thank you in advance for your attention. I’d like to hear your thoughts on this matter. Once again, thank you for your effort and a great blog!

entry.title: Re: System locked; license is invalid or expired
entry.content: Hi! Are you talking about the SAP license? Or the DB license? If it is the DB license, and the DB is SAP HANA, then the suggestions on the KBA mentioned on the answer that was given to this post should fix it.
